title: FreshCore
description:
Techno-Magic Medieval Modpack made to play on our private Minecraft server. 
Which is still available to all in need.
body:
## EN

This modpack is made of mods that improve your gameplay.
Themed around Medieval Techno-Magical vibes.
Contains a lot of small QoL mods to improve visual aspects of a game.

Modpack for our private "KompotCraft Fresh" server players, but available to anyone that is interested in it!

All the mods which are exclusive to CurseForge are creddited down below. 
And done so with every authors permission.


## RU

Сборка состоит из модов улучшающие опыт игры.
В тематике Средневековой Техно-Магии. 
И с кучей мелких модов улучашющих визуальную составляющую игры.

Эта сборка создана для игры на приватном майнкрафт сервере: "KompotCraft Fresh", но при этом подойдет и для тех, кто не осведомлен о сервере!

Все моды, эксклюзивные для сайта CurseForge, с разрешением соответсвующих разработчиков были помечены в описании ниже.



<details>
<summary>Credits (mods added by overrides)</summary>

- [Backpacked by MrCrayfish](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked)
- [Framework by MrCrayfish](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)
- [MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod: Refurbished by MrCrayfish](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)
- [Born In Chaos by mongoose_artist](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
- [Gaze - A Malum Addon by StrawberryBalloons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gaze-a-malum-addon)
- [Etched by jackson (1.21.1 version builded from github)](https://github.com/jacksonhardaway/etched)

</details>
